description: AXI4 virtual interface. SystemVerilog interface that bundles AXI4 channel signals. Connects the UVM driver and monitor to the RTL DUT. The driver drives signals through the interface; the monitor observes them.

ports.name: driver_mp
ports.description: Driver modport — driver drives AXI4 signals through this

ports.name: monitor_mp
ports.description: Monitor modport — monitor observes AXI4 signals through this

ports.name: dut_mp
ports.description: DUT modport — connects to the RTL DUT AXI4 port
